text: Complete experience-mining → social posting pipeline (THE ORIGINAL VISION)
description:
Build the autonomous life-sharing system:
A) Live interesting life (user does this)
B) AI extracts moments from daily experience (photos, voice notes, journal)
C) Transforms into digestible content (captions, stories, reels)
D) Posts autonomously to platforms (Instagram, Twitter, TikTok, YouTube)
E) Revenue flows from platform payments (views, engagement, monetization)

This is THE core product: Just experience → autonomous sharing → passive income

Current state: experience-mining/ exists but not autonomous end-to-end

status.comment: Strategy adjusted: keep manual weekly content workflow as baseline, defer full autonomous posting automation until product/ops constraints are resolved.
